sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115295" key="yalido/stomos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψᾰλῐδό-στομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n115295.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nipper-mouthed,</tr_> Com. epith. of crabs, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:295" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">295</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
